phase_name: ad-hoc bug fix — Unraid silent stream failure

completed_tasks.name: Diagnose silent stream failure on Unraid
Fix page.tsx: show error when stream returns no valid JSON
Verify gpt-5.4 is a valid OpenAI model via API call
Revert default model back to gpt-5.4 (was incorrectly changed to gpt-4o)
Commit and push page.tsx fix to GitHub (921a8b5)
User rebuilt Docker image on Unraid — error message now surfaces correctly

remaining_tasks.name: Get Unraid container logs after clicking Run Analysis to identify actual root cause
Fix the underlying cause once identified from logs

blockers.description: Root cause of empty stream on Unraid still unknown — error message surfaces but underlying API failure not yet diagnosed
blockers.workaround: Need Unraid container logs to identify the actual error

human_actions_pending.action: Run: docker logs <container-name> --tail 50 on Unraid after clicking Run Analysis, share the output
human_actions_pending.context: The onError callback in /api/analyze/route.ts logs the real error server-side as 'Analysis streaming error: ...'. Logs will show the actual failure — bad key, unsupported model, timeout, etc.

human_actions_pending.action: Verify /app/data is mapped to a persistent volume in Unraid container config
human_actions_pending.context: Settings (API key, model) live at /app/data/.filmintern/settings.json — without persistent volume the key resets on restart

decisions.decision: Keep gpt-5.4 as the default model
decisions.rationale: Verified via OpenAI API that gpt-5.4 is a valid model. Not the root cause.

decisions.decision: Show error when stream completes with no valid JSON
decisions.rationale: OpenAI errors mid-stream produce HTTP 200 then empty stream. Client had no feedback. Fix: detect empty accumulated string and show actionable error message.

next_action: Ask user to share Unraid container logs (docker logs <container> --tail 50) after attempting Run Analysis — look for 'Analysis streaming error:' line to get actual error
context_notes: The fix is deployed and working (error message now shows instead of silent failure). But we have not found the root cause yet. Three suspects: (1) API key not persisted due to missing /app/data volume mount on Unraid, (2) gpt-5.4 does not support Output.object structured output mode, (3) Caddy or networking timeout on long requests. Container logs will identify it immediately.
